title: Minecraft, But Eating Drops OP Items
description: Every time you eat you will get an OP item.
body:
Featured plugin of the But Challenge Generator: https://butchallengegenerator.com make your own custom challenges!

Every time you eat you will get an OP item.
To start the plugin run /eatingop start
To stop the plugin run /eatingop stop

Enjoy!

Join my Discord for cool things: https://discord.gg/dZEvtQ9Vhe
